overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The character navigates wet sidewalks and streets past futuristic corporate buildings including prominent Arasaka and Kiroshi signage, with heavy rain creating reflective surfaces on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate sidewalk with Arasaka signage

agents.ego_description: running along the wet sidewalk past the illuminated Arasaka building, weaving between pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella and pink hair walking opposite direction
pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large red illuminated corporate signage on dark glass facade
tall modern building with reflective glass windows and neon accents
tall palm tree with wet fronds lining the sidewalk
tall street lamp emitting cyan neon light

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a rain-soaked sidewalk beside the Arasaka corporate building, illuminated by red neon signage. Sparse pedestrians with umbrellas share the walkway, and palm trees line the street amid the futuristic glass architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: large rain-slicked intersection with traffic signals

events.description: exits covered sidewalk and enters wide open intersection crosswalk
black vehicle with headlights on passes through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: sprinting across the wide intersection toward the opposite side, avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection with headlights illuminating the rain

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with yellow striped markings and wet reflective surface
vertical traffic light showing green signal

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with the character crossing the rain-slicked asphalt. Traffic signals glow green while a black car passes through ahead. The Arasaka building recedes behind as the character moves into the open crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic street with holographic crosswalk projections

events.description: enters street section with green holographic WALK signals projected on the ground

agents.ego_description: running along the street following the projected green crosswalk signals on the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving past on the right side of the street

entered.detail: holographic green WALK text and arrows projected onto the wet street surface
modern glass facade with large digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a street illuminated by holographic green WALK projections on the wet asphalt. Modern glass buildings with digital advertisements line the route while vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching Kiroshi corporate entrance

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath the Kiroshi building overhang
lighting shifts to concentrated cyan neon strips along the left wall

agents.ego_description: running toward the Kiroshi building entrance under the increasingly covered walkway

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with Japanese text 'アイインタラクト' and Kiroshi branding
overhead building structure providing shelter from the rain
continuous horizontal cyan neon lighting along the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Kiroshi building entrance, entering a covered walkway that provides shelter from the heavy rain. Bright cyan neon strips illuminate the left wall while the prominent Kiroshi sign with Japanese text hangs overhead, marking the transition to a more enclosed urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked corporate district that shifts from open, neon-lit streets into a sheltered urban entryway. It begins with the character running along a sidewalk beside the Arasaka building, where red neon signage reflects off the wet pavement and palm trees line the futuristic glass architecture. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wide intersection, crossing rain-slicked asphalt past glowing green traffic signals and a passing black car. The camera then follows the character along a street illuminated by holographic green walk projections and digital advertisements before turning toward the Kiroshi building. Finally, the environment transitions from the heavy rain into a covered walkway, where bright cyan neon strips and a prominent Kiroshi sign mark the entrance to a more enclosed space.
